<!--
Default template — Plan implementation PR (the main path in this repo).

For other PR types, append a query parameter to the PR creation URL:
  - ?template=docs-plan-adr.md  (ADR/Plan-only changes, no code behavior)
  - ?template=fix.md            (bug fix not driven by a Plan)
  - ?template=chore.md          (tooling, dependencies, formatting)
-->

## Review Focus

- [ ] Plan scope is respected
- [ ] ADR consistency is preserved
- [ ] Layer boundaries are preserved (hexagonal)
- [ ] Exception/logging/security behavior follows project policy
- [ ] PR can be squash-merged into one meaningful commit
